r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Fatigue and disease come from aging, stress, or bad luck. The solution is more sleep, less stress, or pharmaceutical drugs.

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Restore alkaline pH balance and experience sustained all-day energy, mental clarity, and disease resistance without stimulants

headline.verbatim_text: The 62¢ Green Energizer that gives you all-day energy WITHOUT caffeine, sugar or stimulants

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Audience expects energy solutions require stimulants (coffee, energy drinks, pills). A 62-cent green drink providing sustained energy without stimulants violates the stimulant-dependency schema.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Stimulant-free sustained energy from alkaline vegetables (vs. saturated caffeine/sugar messaging)

lead.full_text: "Let food be your medicine and medicine be your food." —Hippocrates, 431 B.C. Hippocrates knew 2,400 years ago what modern medicine has forgotten: your body has an extraordinary ability to heal itself when you give it the right raw materials. But here's what Hippocrates didn't know—and what your doctor probably doesn't know either: The #1 reason you're tired, sick, and aging faster than you should is that your body has become dangerously ACIDIC. Every processed food, every stress response, every environmental toxin pushes your blood chemistry toward the acid side of the pH scale. And when your body becomes acidic, it's like trying to run a car on contaminated fuel. Your cells can't produce energy efficiently. Your immune system can't fight off disease. Your organs struggle to function. The solution? It's not a pill. It's not surgery. It's returning your body to its natural alkaline state—the way nature intended.

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Opening with ancient authority (Hippocrates) bridges to modern pH science, violating expectations of either pure ancient wisdom OR pure modern medicine.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Ancient wisdom validated by modern biochemistry

primary_mechanism.name: Alkaline pH Restoration
primary_mechanism.explanation: Your body operates optimally at a slightly alkaline pH of 7.35-7.45. Modern diets heavy in meat, grains, sugar, and processed foods create excess acid. To neutralize this acid, your body strips alkaline minerals (calcium, magnesium, potassium) from bones, teeth, and organs—causing fatigue, disease, and accelerated aging. Concentrated alkaline greens provide these minerals in bioavailable form, instantly neutralizing acid and restoring optimal pH balance.

mechanism_proof.description: pH scale science (7.35-7.45 optimal blood pH)
Customer testimonials of energy restoration within days

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Fatigue and disease come from aging, stress, or bad luck. The solution is more sleep, less stress, or pharmaceutical drugs.
three_part_structure.what_real: Your body is ACIDIC from decades of processed foods, stress, and environmental toxins. This acidity is literally corroding your cells from the inside, stealing minerals from your bones, and preventing efficient energy production.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Coffee and energy drinks add MORE acid to your system, creating a vicious cycle. Sleep doesn't help because your cells can't produce energy in an acidic environment. Drugs treat symptoms but ignore the underlying pH imbalance.

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't lazy or weak. Your body was literally running on 'contaminated fuel' due to acidic blood chemistry. No amount of willpower can overcome biochemistry.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: morning fatigue + afternoon crashes + coffee addiction + brain fog + aching joints + frequent colds + premature aging → all explained by chronic acidity that no one was addressing
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not a tired person who needs more caffeine, but someone whose body chemistry was sabotaged by modern diet and can be restored to vibrant health

promise_architecture.primary_promise: Restore alkaline pH balance and experience sustained all-day energy, mental clarity, and disease resistance without stimulants
promise_architecture.timeframe: Within days for energy boost, 30-90 days for complete transformation
promise_architecture.specificity: Eliminate afternoon crashes, wake up energized, think clearly, strengthen immunity, slow aging

tier_1_proof.description: Hippocrates 2,400-year-old wisdom validated by modern pH science
Blood pH optimal range (7.35-7.45) and mineral buffering system

tier_2_proof.description: 38 health-boosting nutrients from whole food sources
Customer stories of energy restoration and disease reversal

metadata.big_idea: Acidic body chemistry from processed foods is the hidden root cause of fatigue, disease, and aging—alkaline greens reverse it

fssit_candidates.statement: Every time you reach for coffee or an energy drink, you're making the problem WORSE. These acidic stimulants force your exhausted adrenal glands to squeeze out one more drop of emergency energy—while pushing your body even further into the acid danger zone.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why caffeine stops working over time, why you need more and more, why you feel worse when you don't have it. Names the vicious cycle.

fssit_candidates.statement: Your doctor never tested your pH levels. Why? Because medicine doesn't have a profitable drug to fix acidity. But every disease—from cancer to diabetes to heart disease—thrives in an acidic environment.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains medical system's blind spot, why symptoms get treated but root cause ignored, why multiple diseases often cluster together.

fssit_candidates.statement: Hippocrates knew it 2,400 years ago: 'Let food be your medicine.' But Big Pharma can't patent kale. They can't make billions from spinach. So they've convinced you that the solution to fatigue comes in a pill—not from the produce aisle.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Reframes ancient wisdom as suppressed knowledge, explains why simple food solutions aren't promoted, names economic incentive structure.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Concentrated in lead (Hippocrates quote), mechanism section (caffeine vicious cycle), and root cause (pH testing gap)

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Post-2000s alkaline diet movement, green juice trend
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Daily acid accumulation, accelerating aging, environmental toxin exposure increasing
